Assessment Coordinator Signed Assessment as Complete CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the date that the RN Assessment Coordinator signed the assessment as complete.
638 FAC_INTRNL_ID FAC_INTRNL_ID Facility ID CHAR 16 This column contains the facility internal ID for nursing home facilities,
639 A0310H_PTA_DSCHRG_ASMT_IND A0310H_PTA_DSCHRG_ASMT_IND A0310H SNF PPS Part A Discharge Assessment CHAR 1 Indicates if the assessment is a PPS Part A Stay Discharge record. 0=No
1=Yes effective
